name: QA 1768
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1768

Exercise the pmfind_check(1) utility.



Copyright (c) 2020 Red Hat.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform centos6 reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 1768

Exercise the pmfind_check(1) utility.

Copyright (c) 2020 Red Hat. All Rights Reserved.

To reproduce this test in a container, please run:

./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform centos6 reproduce
